idea: add __launch_bounds__(256,1) to reduce register pressure assumptions
justification: The baseline reached only 42.1 TFLOPS on a tiny-M shape, and the nearby small-M shape 256x256x8192 saw a dramatic jump after adding launch bounds; residency pressure is the first grounded structural lever to test.

idea: promote both RHS tensor maps to L2_128B
justification: With N=4096 and K=256, each CTA reuses a narrow RHS slice; nearby small-shape winners improved by selectively promoting RHS maps into L2.

idea: tighten the two stage warpgroup waits from 1 to 0
justification: Small-K kernels have little pipeline depth to hide, so reducing consumer wait distance is a grounded latency experiment once occupancy-focused launch bounds are in place.

idea: promote the output tensor map to L2_128B
justification: The shape writes many small output tiles across 16 N-tiles, so output-side L2 promotion is worth isolating after stabilizing the producer-consumer schedule.

idea: promote all tensor maps to L2_256B
justification: The 256x256x8192 neighbor peaked with all tensor maps promoted to L2_256B; this tests whether the same cache residency trick helps the wider-N but tiny-K shape.

idea: insert producer nanosleep(100) after metadata barrier arrival
justification: ncu was unavailable on this tiny kernel, so the next best grounded signal is prior timing history where short producer sleeps occasionally improved tiny-shape overlap by smoothing metadata consumption.

idea: insert producer nanosleep(200) after full-stage barrier arrival
justification: The neighboring 256x256x8192 shape improved with full-stage nanosleep, making this a data-grounded micro-overlap test after cache and wait-depth sweeps.
For N=4096, halving WARP_N doubles the N-grid depth and can improve parallelism; the 256x256x4096 best kernel also settled on WARP_N=128.
If WARP_N=128 helps occupancy but still leaves latency, pairing it with the more aggressive wait policy is the next non-duplicate structural mutation.

idea: add __launch_bounds__(320,1) as an intermediate residency hint
justification: The 256x256x8192 winner finally peaked with launch_bounds(320,1); this shape is similarly tiny in M and K, so the intermediate occupancy hint is grounded by nearby wins.

idea: promote only the LHS tensor map to L2_128B
justification: After wider cache experiments, isolate whether the packed sparse lhs stream is the only worthwhile promoted input on this narrow-K workload.

idea: promote only the metadata tensor map to L2_256B
justification: Tiny-K sparse kernels can become metadata-sensitive; this isolates metadata reuse without reusing the broader all256 combination.
